title: Harness Support
description: Compare you-agent-factory harness support across claude, codex, opencode, pi, cursor, and agy for MCP, worktrees, loop, thinking controls, open source, and external models.
openingSummary: Harness Support is the you-agent-factory reference for which agent runtimes the factory drives and which features each harness covers.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: Harness Support compares the agent runtimes you-agent-factory can drive and the feature coverage each one offers. Use it when you need a scannable answer to which harnesses are supported and which capabilities — such as MCP, worktrees, loop, thinking controls, open-source status, or external model support — each one covers.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: A harness is the agent runtime the factory drives, such as a coding agent under a shared factory process. This page compares factory-supported harnesses by feature coverage. It does not redefine the harness concept in full; that definition lives on the harness concept page.

supportMatrix.title: Support Matrix
supportMatrix.body: Compare factory-supported harnesses across MCP, worktrees, loop, thinking controls, open-source status, and external model support. Cell values are yes, no, or partial.

howToUse.title: How To Use
howToUse.body: Scan the support matrix for the feature you need, then read across harness columns to see which runtimes cover it. Use clear cell values such as yes, no, or partial to compare options before you pick a harness for MCP, worktrees, loop, thinking controls, open-source status, or external models.

limitsAndAssumptions.title: Limits And Assumptions
limitsAndAssumptions.body: This page is a web harness-support matrix reference. It is not a full runner or provider field dump, not a sync of packaged CLI docs, not the harness concept glossary, and not an agent-factory comparison blog. Claims stay conservative when product evidence is incomplete: partial cells mark uncertain or incomplete coverage rather than inventing full support.
